description: Frontend design scrutiny pass — fix visual issues, spacing, information hierarchy, and interaction problems across all views. Use the frontend-design skill for aesthetic evaluation.

userStories.title: Right Panel Layout — Details + Staging Split
userStories.description: As a user, I want the right panel to properly divide space between commit details (top) and staging area (bottom) so both are usable.
acceptanceCriteria: The right panel (340px) is split vertically: commit details takes top ~60%, staging area takes bottom ~40%
Both sections scroll independently — commit details scrolls its own content, staging scrolls its own file lists
A subtle 1px border separates the two sections
The staging area header 'STAGING AREA · N files' is always visible as a sticky bar at the split point
File names in the staging area truncate with ellipsis — no overflow or clipping
The commit form (message input, commit button) is always visible at the bottom without scrolling
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: The right panel in AppLayout.tsx contains DetailPanel + StatusPanel stacked in a flex column. Use flex-shrink, min-height, and overflow-y: auto to share space. The commit form should use flex-shrink: 0 to stay pinned.

userStories.title: Center Panel — Remove Repo Header Redundancy
userStories.description: As a user, I want the center panel to maximize space for the commit graph.
acceptanceCriteria: The repo name + path header ('gitslop /home/benki/...') is removed from center panel — already shown in titlebar
The 'Close' button moves to the tab bar (close tab = close repo) or titlebar
The refresh button moves to the toolbar or is removed (auto-fetch handles it)
The 'Filter History' bar is more compact (28px height)
The 'COMMIT GRAPH · N commits' header is compact — 28px, inline with refresh icon
The 'Editor (show)' button at bottom is removed or moved to toolbar
Net result: first commit row is higher, more visible rows
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: RepoView.tsx renders the repo header. The repo name is in titlebar center. Close button should be on the tab (TabBar already has close). Refresh can be a toolbar icon or removed since auto-fetch exists.

userStories.title: Commit Graph Row Visual Refinement
userStories.description: As a user, I want commit graph rows to have proper hover states, selection indicators, and clean text layout.
acceptanceCriteria: Each commit row has hover background (var(--bg-hover)) with var(--transition-fast)
Selected commit row has 3px left accent border (var(--accent)) and subtle background tint
Commit hash is monospace, muted, brightens on hover
Commit message truncates with ellipsis — never pushes author/date off screen
Author name and date are right-aligned, muted, fixed-width so they don't jump
Branch/tag pill badges have consistent padding (4px 8px), var(--radius-sm), don't overlap message
Row height is consistent at 34px with vertical centering
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: CommitGraph.tsx and CommitGraph.module.css. Rows are in react-window virtualized list. Focus on hover/selected visual states and text truncation/overflow.

userStories.title: Detail Panel Content Typography and Layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want commit details to be scannable with clear visual hierarchy.
acceptanceCriteria: Commit subject displayed as title: var(--font-md), font-weight 600
SHA hash in monospace with copy button showing 'Copied!' feedback
Author and date on separate lines with Lucide icons as labels, muted text
Ref badges (branches, tags) as colored pills below the subject
Changed Files section with clear header showing count and +/- stats
Each file: status icon (colored), filename (bold), +/- counts right-aligned
Empty state: centered GitCommit icon and text, vertically centered
Consistent padding: var(--space-md) horizontal, var(--space-sm) between items
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: DetailPanel.tsx and DetailPanel.module.css. Panel is 340px wide so space is tight. Use truncation and compact layouts. Focus on typography hierarchy.

userStories.title: Staging Area Adapt to Narrow Right Panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want the staging area to work in the narrow 340px right panel.
acceptanceCriteria: The two-column layout (unstaged | staged) stacks vertically at 340px: unstaged on top, staged below
File items show: status icon, filename (truncated ellipsis), +/- button right-aligned
Directory paths hidden at narrow width — show on hover tooltip only
'Stage All' and 'Unstage All' are compact icon buttons, not full-width text
Commit message input is full-width
Commit/push buttons are compact, single line, no wrapping
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: StatusPanel.tsx and StatusPanel.module.css. Was designed for ~900px center panel. Now in 340px right panel. The side-by-side layout won't fit — needs responsive stacking or tabs.

userStories.title: Sidebar Visual Consistency
userStories.description: As a user, I want the sidebar to have polished hover states, active indicators, and consistent spacing.
acceptanceCriteria: Branch items have 6px vertical padding and hover background var(--bg-hover)
Active branch has accent left border or background tint
Section headers (BRANCHES, REMOTES, TAGS, STASHES) have consistent uppercase style with count badges
Filter input has proper padding and subtle focus border
Collapse/expand chevrons are aligned and rotate smoothly
GIT/FILES tabs have clear active indicator (bottom border or background)
No double borders between sections
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Sidebar.tsx and Sidebar.module.css. Focus on hover states, active indicators, spacing consistency.

userStories.title: Tab Bar and Titlebar Cohesion
userStories.description: As a user, I want the tab bar and titlebar to look cohesive and not duplicate information.
acceptanceCriteria: Tab bar + titlebar together use max 68px (36px + 32px)
Active tab has 2px bottom accent border
Tab text truncates at max-width 160px with ellipsis
'+' button is subtle: Plus icon, var(--text-muted), hover brightens
Titlebar center doesn't duplicate the tab name — shows branch only, or nothing if tab shows repo name
With one tab, avoid redundancy between tab name and titlebar
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: TabBar.tsx, TitleBar.tsx and their CSS modules. Check for info duplication between tab bar and titlebar.

userStories.title: Global Color and Typography Consistency Sweep
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all components to use design tokens consistently with no hardcoded values.
acceptanceCriteria: Grep all .module.css files for hardcoded hex colors (#xxx) — replace with var(--*) tokens
All section headers use same style: var(--font-xs), font-weight 600, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.5px
All interactive elements have focus-visible outlines
All hover states use var(--transition-fast)
No orphaned or double borders between adjacent panels
Font sizes follow token scale (no arbitrary px values outside tokens)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Sweep across ALL .module.css files. Use grep to find hardcoded colors. Check CommitGraph, StatusPanel, DetailPanel, Sidebar, Toolbar, StatusBar, TabBar modules.
